meta.race_name: Midnite: Built For 2026 Not 2006 Classified Stakes (Div 2)

rankings.name: East Tyrone
key_positive_factors: Proven C&D winner in January
Excellent close fourth (beaten 1.5l) over C&D last week
Booking of Billy Loughnane is a major signal of intent
key_risks: Has been beaten as favorite in similar company recently
RPR trend has plateaued around the 59-60 mark

rankings.name: Legendsoftheland
key_positive_factors: Joint top-rated RPR (59) in the field
Strong progressive form (3rd and 2nd) since wind op and gelding
Stable is currently operating at a healthy strike rate
key_risks: Dropping back to 6f from 7f; may find the pace too sharp
First time at Wolverhampton (Tapeta) after Irish/AW starts elsewhere

rankings.name: Sisters In The Sky
key_positive_factors: C&D winner as recently as January
Significantly better draw today than when trapped wide last week
Luke Morris is a specialist at executing tactics on this surface
key_risks: Must bounce back from a very poor effort as market favorite latest
Often requires things to fall perfectly to get his head in front

rankings.name: Alyara
key_positive_factors: Excellent course form; beaten just 0.5l over C&D last week
Jack Mitchell is a high-caliber jockey upgrade
Handicapped to be very competitive on current mark of 44
key_risks: Extremely low win strike rate (3-63) indicates she is often a bridesmaid
Lower Top Speed (42) compared to primary rivals

rankings.name: Black Cab
key_positive_factors: Past C&D winner who handles this specific track configuration well
Second run after a wind operation is often the peak performance
Saffie Osborne booked for a stable that target these prizes
key_risks: Current RPR (50) is significantly below what is required to win this
No form of note since being purchased for 10,000gns last year

rankings.name: Beautiful Things
key_positive_factors: Highest Top Speed (55) in the entire field based on recent metrics
Fair fifth at Chelmsford suggests she has returned to AW in good heart
key_risks: Remains an 18-race maiden; find winning difficult
Needs to translate that raw speed into a finishing kick

rankings.name: She Went Whoosh
key_positive_factors: Solid C&D second in January shows she can handle the track
Handicap mark continues to slide to a dangerous level
key_risks: Form figures show a clear regressionary trend (4-2-4-7)
Jumping off the screen as a horse that has potentially gone off the boil

rankings.name: Green Valentine
key_positive_factors: Previous winner at Newcastle over this trip
Stable change (Damien Wingrove) could provide the necessary 'spark'
key_risks: Form has completely collapsed since the turn of the year
Sold cheaply (1,400gns) recently, suggesting limited expectations from former yard

forecast_top_3.combination: East Tyrone (IRE) > Sisters In The Sky (IRE)

tricast_top_3.combination: East Tyrone (IRE) > Legendsoftheland (IRE) > Sisters In The Sky (IRE)
East Tyrone (IRE) > Sisters In The Sky (IRE) > Legendsoftheland (IRE)
Legendsoftheland (IRE) > East Tyrone (IRE) > Sisters In The Sky (IRE)

pace_analysis.insight: Beautiful Things (IRE) holds the field's highest Top Speed (55) and is likely to ensure a high tempo, favoring tactically versatile C&D winners like East Tyrone (IRE).

mordin.late_intelligence_flag: No adjustment required. Late intelligence from X indicates no significant market-moving factors (sweating, late support, or stable whispers) for the primary contenders.
